message:
chore(audit): batch 538 — security audit of protocol parsers, all SOUND

WebSocket frame.rs: non-minimal encoding, MSB check, control frame cap
HPACK hpack.rs: Huffman bits>=30 guard, checked integer arithmetic
HTTP/1.1 codec.rs: smuggling prevention, duplicate header rejection

Also verified: retry, reconnect, load_balance service combinators all
SOUND (agents' race condition claims are false positives due to &mut self
exclusion in Service trait).

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
